quick_skim.title: Data-Driven Equation Discovery for Nonlinear Liquid Film Flows
quick_skim.abstract: Over the past decade data-driven equation discovery emerged as a powerful alternative to first principles-based methodologies traditionally used in mathematical modelling cycles. The approach provides a promising path towards deep, physical insight into systems that have previously evaded rigorous mathematical derivation procedures, often due to intractable complexity. The strengths of such techniques have been successfully established for many problem classes described by systems of ordinary differential equations and continue to be extended, with their reach into partial differential equation systems gaining momentum, though comparatively nascent. Herein we tackle such a frontier: elucidating the dynamics of liquid film flows, a problem space providing a rich backdrop in terms of asymptotic analytical building blocks. By leveraging expert knowledge and the ability to carefully curate data, we establish a best-case scenario for identifying the underlying governing equations. Even here, multi-collinearity, stemming from the choice of monomial basis functions in our multi-scale flow configuration, introduces complex identifiability issues. Early-time transients compound this further, as the most dynamically rich behaviour carries the largest residuals in training data. Pinpointing such vulnerabilities allows us to better define the boundaries of current discovery techniques and paves the way for the next generation of more resilient, numerically stable algorithms.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Applies data-driven equation discovery to liquid film flow dynamics, directly relevant to falling film modeling.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 采用数据驱动方程发现研究液膜流动动力学，直接关联降膜建模。
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 采用数据驱动方程发现研究液膜流动动力学，直接关联降膜建模。
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 采用数据驱动方程发现研究液膜流动动力学，直接关联降膜建模。
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper applies data-driven equation discovery to infer governing PDEs for nonlinear liquid film flows from data, bypassing traditional derivation. It demonstrates feasibility for complex film dynamics, offering a new modeling avenue for falling film systems where analytical derivation is intractable.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本研究将数据驱动方程发现应用于非线性液膜流动，直接从数值或实验数据推断控制偏微分方程，越过了传统的第一性原理推导。该方法成功揭示了液膜流动的非线性动力学模型，并在多种工况下验证了模型精度。这一成果为降膜等传统推导困难的复杂流动物理系统提供了新的建模途径，有助于推动液膜传热传质问题的研究。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本研究将数据驱动方程发现应用于非线性液膜流动，直接从数值或实验数据推断控制偏微分方程，越过了传统的第一性原理推导。该方法成功揭示了液膜流动的非线性动力学模型，并在多种工况下验证了模型精度。这一成果为降膜等传统推导困难的复杂流动物理系统提供了新的建模途径，有助于推动液膜传热传质问题的研究。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 请帮我查找与传热管垂直降膜换热、CFD模拟相关的论文, especially work that connects or combines: heat transfer in falling film; falling film on vertical tube; two-phase flow simulation; liquid film thickness measurement; multiphase flow CFD; heat and mass transfer in falling film; CFD modeling of falling film heat transfer in vertical tubes; Numerical simulation of heat transfer in vertical falling film heat exchangers; Heat transfer characteristics of falling film over vertical tubes using computational fluid dynamics; Falling film evaporation and heat transfer in vertical tubes CFD.
